name: Carlsbad Cavern Court
demoNotice: Demo draft, not an official website.
headline: Perfect Base for Exploring the Caverns.
description: Carlsbad Cavern Court is a retro motor court-style motel walking distance to the National Park visitor center. Clean, comfortable rooms with a courtyard pool, and a location you can't beat for cavern tours, hiking, and desert adventures.

features.title: Walking Distance to Caverns
features.description: Half-mile from park entrance — perfect for early tours.

features.title: Courtyard Pool
features.description: Seasonal outdoor pool in a peaceful garden setting.

features.title: Free Parking & WiFi
features.description: Spacious parking for trucks and boats.
